name: Xero
description: Cloud accounting software built for small businesses that need live bookkeeping, invoicing, bank reconciliation, payroll integrations, and clean month-end visibility.
whyUseIt: Xero gives founders a real operating view of cash, receivables, payables, and monthly performance without waiting on a spreadsheet from someone else. It is strong for founder-led businesses that want simple finance hygiene and fast visibility.
aiCapabilities: Xero uses automation for bank rule matching, invoice reminders, transaction coding suggestions, and anomaly spotting across reconciliations.
